ModMetaData.name: Janitor's Closet
ModMetaData.author: Terra Incognita
ModMetaData.description:
Anyone can scrub a floor. A janitor cleans.
Janitor's Closet turns cleaning from an everyday chore into a profession. Put the right colonists on the job and the colony quietly reshapes itself around their work — kitchens that stay safe to cook in after a long siege, hospital corridors that don't carry the smell of the last raid into the wards, a rec room that somehow looks halfway decent when visitors turn up. They're the colonists you'll find yourself watching while they work, and the ones you'll miss when they're not around.
Cleanliness isn't cosmetic. A janitor is a shield against chaos — and you only see their real work once they stop cleaning.
